backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that defines Island, Attraction, Beach, and Tip types, stores island data in a Map, and exposes an initializeIslands function pre-populated with data for Big Island, Maui, Oahu, and other Hawaiian islands.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three product features (travel guide sections, tropical visual theme, static image rendering) to their implementing source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries for each frontend source file, covering routing, data fetching hooks, image mapping, layout, island card, home page, detail page, styles, and Tailwind config.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines shadcn-compatible OKLCH CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React app with a root div and a module script entry point targeting src/main.tsx, titled HawaiiGuide.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with root, home (/), and island detail (/island/$name) routes, and wraps the app in an AppInitializer that calls initializeIslands() on the backend actor on mount.
frontend/src/components/IslandCard.tsx: Clickable card component that displays an island's illustration, name, description, beach/attraction/tip counts, and navigates to the island detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Full-page layout wrapper providing a sticky ocean-dark header with logo and nav links, a main content slot, and a footer with branding and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches a backend actor via React Query, using an authenticated identity when available or falling back to an anonymous actor, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines two React Query hooks—`useAllIslands` and `useIslandByName`—that fetch island data from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a tropical Hawaii-themed OKLCH color palette with light and dark mode CSS variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component featuring a hero banner, stats bar, and a grid of island cards fetched via `useAllIslands`, with loading skeletons and error handling.
frontend/src/pages/IslandDetail.tsx: Detail page for a single Hawaiian island, fetching data by name via `useIslandByName` and displaying a hero image, description, stats, attractions, and beaches.
frontend/src/utils/imageMapper.ts: Utility module that maps Hawaiian island names to their corresponding static image paths and provides a URL-encoding helper for island slugs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with a tropical color palette (ocean, coral, golden, palm, sand) using OKLCH CSS variables, custom fonts, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of the HawaiiGuide app project, including existing features, a pending backend feature request for island data storage, image requirements, and architectural notes at schema version 1.0.0.
